fields.helpText: The DZ DEVICE NUMBER is used for disconnecting the port connected to the DZ through a software disconnect.   It is also used for printer contention.  It should contain the alpha- numeric name of the printer with the 'Micom line or shelf/channel' field entered and an entry for the DZ device and the associated 'Micom port or shelf/channel' field entered.  The DZ device should be the same as $I found in the DEVICE file for the printer.
The Micom Port that the DZ Device connects to.
The Micom Line that the contention printer connects to.
Used to control whether a software disconnect should be performed on this device.
